title: OutlookMailbox
description: A mailbox or message store available through the local Outlook installation.

id.description: Short opaque mailbox identifier. It is unique for the current sidecar runtime and logically stable across restarts while the Outlook profile and store identity remain unchanged.

profileName.description: Name of the Outlook profile containing this mailbox. Omitted when the platform or standalone store has no profile concept.

source.description: Implementation-defined local Outlook storage source. Known values include pst, ost, macOsProfile, and windowsOutlook.
